rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE FRIDA KOPPL TRUST ONE DATED 8/5/11 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Against Petitioner And Or Petitioners Attorneys Of Record For Frivolous Action, Bad Faith, Or Delay By Respondents Monica Zimmerman And Alan Zimmerman
rulings.Rulings: Respondent's motion for sanctions under CCP Sec. 128.5 is denied. There is no showing that Petitioner's counsel met and conferred in bad faith. A party is allowed to amend once as a matter of right after a motion to strike is filed bu before it is heard, if the amended pleading is filed and served no later than the date for filing an opposition to the motion (CCP Sec. 472). Petitioner's request for sanctions to be discussed.
